summary: Classified the 10 live inventory PRs independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical is present, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and the job/fix artifact disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and fix-PR actions. Most PRs should stay open with concrete proof/check/review blockers; four need targeted maintainer or author-follow-up judgment before any close/merge/fix path.
